text.title: AWS Three-Tier Architecture (VPC, ALB, App, Database) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals on the input to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when the right path is ambiguous.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the workload web-app + relational DB AND requires HA?

conclusion.verdict: Multi-AZ + single shared NAT + Aurora SLv2

text.example: web_app_relational=true → env=prod → Multi-AZ + per-AZ NAT + Aurora SLv2. References rule multi-az-per-tier.
